No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course includes '飲食營養面面觀' (Diet and Nutrition overview), directly addressing Target 2.2 on ending malnutrition and meeting nutritional needs, as identified by Model B.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course title 'Health and Life' and extensive topics like '癌症防治', '心理健康', '菸酒毒癮防治', '失智症照護' directly align with multiple targets of SDG 3, making it a core contributor.

Quality Education.reason: The course covers '健康識能' (Health Literacy), which aligns with Target 4.7 by equipping learners with knowledge for promoting well-being and sustainable lifestyles.
